scripts.e2e:publish: nx build ng-prism --skip-nx-cache && rm -rf tmp/local-registry/storage/ng-prism && npm cache clean --force && cd packages/ng-prism && npm publish --no-git-checks --registry=http://localhost:4873
scripts.e2e:setup: pnpm nx build ng-prism --skip-nx-cache && rm -rf packages/ng-prism/node_modules/@angular packages/ng-prism/node_modules/@angular-devkit && cd test-workspace && npm install --prefer-online && npx ng add file:../packages/ng-prism --project=test-lib --skip-confirmation
scripts.e2e:serve: cd test-workspace && trap 'lsof -ti:4400 | xargs kill 2>/dev/null' EXIT INT TERM && ng run test-lib:prism
scripts.e2e:clean: rm -rf test-workspace/node_modules test-workspace/package-lock.json test-workspace/ng-prism.config.ts && rm -f test-workspace/projects/test-lib-prism/src/prism-manifest.ts test-workspace/projects/test-lib-prism/src/index.html test-workspace/projects/test-lib-prism/tsconfig.app.json && git checkout -- test-workspace/angular.json && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('test-workspace/package.json','utf8'));delete (p.devDependencies||{})['ng-prism'];delete (p.dependencies||{})['ng-prism'];fs.writeFileSync('test-workspace/package.json',JSON.stringify(p,null,2)+'\n')"
